description: Built Scott McMichael 1:1 prep sheet using only email data. Did not check Obsidian (Mind/One Texas/) for scorecard, revenue, and pipeline snapshots that Chase maintains automatically.
correction: One Texas scorecard data lives in Obsidian at Mind/One Texas/. Should always be checked when building prep for Scott or any One Texas-related conversation.
systemic_fix: Add Obsidian One Texas check to 1:1 prep workflow for Scott and any North America conversation touching One Texas metrics.
